sentence: Aliquid aegre fers? Dem auxilium tibi.
Where are the rest of your people?
The same way you got here. By accident.
Every question I answer will simply lead to another question. You should rest. Just be grateful you're alive.
There were other people on my ship. I need to--
No! If there are other people on the island, I will find them.
Yes you can!...That's good! One more push!
There's another baby... push again! Here it comes! Now!
It's a game. You play it.
Can you show me how to play?
If you promise not to tell Mother.
So... do you want to play or don't you, Jacob?
He's down at the beach... staring out at the ocean.
If you like, you can sort that.
What were you and your brother doing down at the beach?
Jacob told you what I found...
Of course he did. Jacob doesn't know how to lie. He's not like you.
Of course you can. That's why I left it for you.
Of course it did. Where else would it come from?
From somewhere else. Across the sea...
There is nowhere else. The Island is all there is.
Then where did we come from?
You and your brother came from me, and I came from my mother.
Something you will never have to worry about.
Where did they come from? They looked like us!
They're not like us. They don't belong here. We are here for a reason.
Did you know about the people?
Why didn't you tell us about them?
Because they're dangerous and I didn't want to frighten you.
The same thing that makes all men dangerous. They come, they fight, they destroy, they corrupt... and it always ends the same.
Another part of the island. And you're never to go looking for them. If they found you, they would hurt you.
Because they're people, Jacob, and that's what people do.
But we're people. Does that mean that we can hurt each other?
I've made it so you can never hurt each other.
This is the reason you're here.
Light. The warmest, brightest light you've ever seen or felt. And we must make sure that no one ever finds it.
Yes it is. And that's why they want it. Because a little bit of this very same light is inside of every man. But they always want more.
No. But they would try. And if they tried they could put it out. And if the light goes out here... it goes out everywhere. And so I've protected this place. But I can't protect it forever.
It will have to be one of you.
I found it. One day, you can make up your own game and everyone else will have to follow your rules.
It's all right... Don't be afraid.
I'm going for a walk to the beach. I'll meet you later.
Because I'm dead... Will you come with me? I'd like to show you something.
Where you came from. It's across the Island--a place you've never seen.
They came here 13 years ago. The day before you were born. Their ship was wrecked in a storm.
It's a way for people to get from one place to another. It's how we came across the sea.
There are many things across the sea... You come from across the sea, too.
No. That's not true. That's not what my mother told me.
Jacob. Jacob, wake up. Come with me.
Why do you have all your things?
They're our things... I took them because we're leaving and we're never coming back.
No. We're supposed to stay away from them.
They're our people, Jacob, and we're gonna live with them.
She lied, she lied about everything--all of it. I know you don't understand, but you have to come with me. I don't want to go by myself.
He's leaving. He's going to them...to the other people!
I know now. There is another place across the sea. It's where I'm from and I'm gonna go there. I'm gonna go home.
You killed my mother... Jacob, she was your mother, too. We don't belong here. We don't belong with her. Come with me.
My love, you need to know this. Whatever you have been told, you will never be able to leave this Island.
That's not true. One day I can prove it.
Do you think he'll come back?
He said you killed our mother... Is that true?
Yes... If I had let her live, she would have taken you back to her people; and those people are bad, Jacob--very bad. I-I couldn't let you become one of them. I needed you to stay good.
Then, why do you love him more than me?
I love you in--in different ways. Will you stay with me, Jacob? Please?
Then, I'm sorry I asked about her. Why do you watch us, Jacob?
I watch because I wanna know if Mother's right.
Oh, you mean my people. You wanna know if they're bad. That woman may be insane, but she's most definitely right about that.
I don't know. They don't seem so bad to me.
That's easy for you to say. Looking down on us from above. Trust me, I've lived among them for 30 years. They're greedy, manipulative, untrustworthy, and selfish.
Then why are you with them?
They're a means to an end.
I'm leaving, Jacob. I found a way off the Island.
No, it's impossible. There is no way off the Island.

There are very smart men among us. Men who are curious about how things work. Together we have discovered places all over this Island where metal behaves strangely. When we find one of these sites, we dig. And this time we found something. Come with me, Jacob. Please... What are you gonna do when she dies?
Well, I don't wanna leave this Island. It's my home.
What did he say to you, Jacob?
He said he's finally found a way to leave the Island.

Well, Mother, you should be. I spent 30 years searching for that place you brought me as a child--that...waterfall with that beautiful light. I've walked this island from end to end, not once coming close to finding it. But, then I began to think--what if the light underneath the island--what if I could get to it from someplace else? Figuring out how to reach it took a very long time.
The people with you, they saw this, too?
Yes, they have some very interesting ideas about what to do with it.
Do with it? You don't have any idea wh--
I have no idea because you wouldn't tell me, Mother.

It's a wheel... We're going to make an opening...one much bigger than this one; and, then I'm going to attach that wheel to a system we're building. A system that channels the water and the light. And then I'm gonna turn it. And when I do...I'll finally be able to leave this place.
How do you know all this? How do you know it will work?
Please don't do this... Don't go.
Then I suppose this is goodbye.
Yes. I had to say goodbye to your brother.
I don't have a choice. It's what he wants. Do you recognize this place?
Do you remember what I showed you here?
You're going to protect it now.
Life, death, rebirth. It's the source, the heart of the island. Just promise me. no matter what you do, you won't ever go down there.
It'd be worse than dying, Jacob...much worse.
Nam non accipimus hoc quasi vulgarem potionem, sed ut ille sit quasi unus mecum.
You'll accept the responsibility that you will protect this place for as long as you can; and, then you'll have to find your replacement.
I don't want to protect this place.
Why? Why is your time over?
It has to be you, Jacob.
No, it doesn't. You wanted it to be him. But now I'm all you have.
It was always supposed to be you, Jacob. I see that now. And one day, you'll see it, too; but, until then...you don't really have a choice... Please, take the cup and drink.
Now, you and I...are the same
Yes, there is... You should go, get some firewood before it rains.
Why wouldn't you let me leave, mother?
Because I...I love you. Thank you.
Don't. Jacob, don't do this. She burned them. She was crazy. She burned them all! You can't kill me, Jacob. She made it that way. You can't.
Don't worry, brother. I'm not going to kill you.
Uhh. She brought you back here?
Because I have to protect it now.
You want to find the light? You want to leave this place, brother? Then go.
Who are they? Where'd they come from?
Didn't you guys shoot a polar bear last week?
Hello? Anybody there? Who were these men?
Our very own Adam and Eve.
